title: Minecraft Trailer Edition: trails and tales
description: A minecraft modpack that look actually look like trails and tales trailer!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/810e23a2a830d945c55ff3f8e78b16de8ca2ed64.png)

**THING THAT YOU NEED TO KNOW BEFORE YOU USE THE SHADER**
THIS MODPACK NORMALLY USE RETHINKING VOXEL BUT IF IT HAS ANY PROBLEM CHANGE TO COMPLEMENTARY IN IMMEDINLY

**WHAT DOES THIS MODPACK DID?**
It just make it look like the trails and tales trailer

**WHY**

why not
